experiences.company: Data Science Student Society at UC San Diego
experiences.title: Software Lead
description: Directed a 10-person engineering team to architect and ship a React/TypeScript membership portal serving 1,000+ users, replacing manual tracking.
Accelerated deployment cycles and resolved 10+ weekly hotfixes by engineering GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines and enforcing strict Agile PR reviews.
Secured member data and event analytics by building a robust Supabase/Postgres backend, implementing complex Row Level Security authentication flows.
Increased student confidence in industry software tools by 52% [d=1.26, p<0.01] by designing and delivering technical workshops on React, AWS, Docker, and Git/Github.

experiences.company: Data Science Student Society at UC San Diego
experiences.title: Software Developer
description: Built responsive frontend features for club websites using React.
Led a workshop on developing a personal portfolio site, guiding students through design, layout, and deployment best practices.
Collaborated with a cross-functional team to deliver clean, user-friendly interfaces for student organizations.

experiences.title: Data Engineer Intern
description: Saved $100k+ in annual vendor costs by independently architecting and deploying a containerized data ingestion scraper on AWS ECS and Lambda.
Saved 50+ hours monthly by engineering an AI pipeline with AWS Bedrock and Redshift, transforming raw patient data into automated clinical narratives.
Standardized deployments by building multi-environment CI/CD workflows and provisioning infrastructure as code (IaC) using Terraform and AWS Lambda.
Garnered 1,000+ monthly views by developing interactive PowerBI dashboards, directly integrating AWS S3 and Redshift to visualize clinical data.

experiences.title: Data Science Intern
description: Supported evidence-based policymaking by building an NLP data pipeline using Playwright and Hugging Face Transformers for sentiment analysis.
Increased transparency on municipal spending by designing interactive Python (Pandas, Plotly Dash) visualizations for non-technical stakeholders.

experiences.title: Code Coach
description: Led 4 week-long summer camps, teaching Python fundamentals to over 50 students ages 6–17 through hands-on projects and games.
Provided 1-on-1 tutoring in Lua for Roblox game development, helping students apply programming concepts to interactive, real-world applications.
Fostered a fun and supportive learning environment that encouraged curiosity, problem-solving, and creativity in young coders.

experiences.title: Mathematics Tutor
description: Shared my love of math with many kids, inspiring them to see the beauty in it rather than it being a chore.
